temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) In a dark, industrial-looking room, a man in a black coat is violently thrown backward through a large, arched window. The window shatters on impact, sending shards of glass flying through the air as debris scatters across the floor. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a violent and chaotic event, suggesting an escape or an attack is in progress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, impactful sound of a body hitting glass, followed by the sharp, tinkling sound of shattering glass and a low, ominous musical score.)
(00:02-00:05) A chaotic scene unfolds as students in dark robes, resembling those from a school, run frantically down a wide, stone staircase. The camera follows their panicked descent, with some students stumbling and looking back in fear. (Storyline: This segment introduces a large group of characters in a state of panic, creating a sense of urgency and mystery about what they are fleeing from.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A cacophony of panicked screams, shuffling feet, and a fast-paced, dramatic orchestral score that heightens the tension.)
